source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Dinoco Airlines at http://localhost:3011 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). For your flight DN1563 from Montego Bay (MBJ) to Scranton (AVP), confirmation DN-83823, departing July 9, 2026, open the seat map and change your seat to economy seat 16A. Save the seat selection.
